text: You are fighting a fire in a watertight compartment using hoses and river water. Stability may be reduced because of:

options.text: B) Reduction of water in the storage tanks
C) Increase in free surface which reduces the metacentric height
D) Reduction of KG to the minimum allowable

explanation: Free surface effect occurs when a compartment is partially filled with water, causing the center of gravity to shift and significantly reducing the metacentric height (GM), affecting stability.
